SourceProxy.name: SHYXSelectionFillAlphaReunionFilter
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Selection: Fill, Alpha Wrap, Union

Documentation.short_help: Split by selection, hole-fill both, Alpha wrap selection, CGAL union with face origin, then local bridge remesh/smooth.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Splits the surface into the selected and unselected regions, fills boundary holes (CGAL) on each part, runs Alpha Wrapping on the selected part (CGAL 5.5+), and merges the two closed-oriented surfaces with a CGAL PMP boolean union that tracks which faces came from the Alpha-Wrapped mesh. Those faces are marked exactly (no distance heuristic), dilated by a few face rings across the boolean seam, then locally remeshed and smoothed. When the unselected part is empty (entire surface selected), only the selected path is output. Use Selection on port 1, or a cell data mask (SelectionCellArrayName) like other SHYX selection tools.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Cells to treat as the region that is hole-filled and Alpha-wrapped; the complement is hole-filled and then unioned.

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional: when Selection is not connected, name of a cell data array on the mesh. Same rule as SHYX Delete Selected Cells: integral non-zero or float > 0.5 selects a cell.

IntVectorProperty.name: FairingContinuity
IntVectorProperty.label: Fairing (hole fill)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Continuity for CGAL hole fill on both sub-meshes (0 / 1 / 2), same as SHYX Hole Fill.

IntVectorProperty.name: SkipAlphaWrapping
IntVectorProperty.label: Skip Alpha wrap (selected only)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If on, the selected part is only hole-filled (no Alpha Wrapping).

IntVectorProperty.name: AbsoluteThresholds
IntVectorProperty.label: Alpha wrap: absolute Alpha/Offset
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If off, Alpha and Offset are percentages of the mesh length (see VESPA Alpha Wrapping).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Alpha
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Alpha
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Alpha wrap parameter (maximum circumradius of faces in the result).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Alpha wrap offset (dilatation / shrink factor depending on context).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes (from full input)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Probe the original full surface onto the merged result.

IntVectorProperty.name: EnableBridgeCleanup
IntVectorProperty.label: Bridge cleanup after union
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Mark faces that originated from the Alpha-Wrapped mesh during CGAL corefinement union (precise provenance), dilate a few face rings over the boolean seam, then run a local isotropic remesh + constrained smooth.

IntVectorProperty.name: BridgeDilateLayers
IntVectorProperty.label: Bridge: dilate layers
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Face-ring expansion of the Alpha-Wrap mark so the messy union seam is included.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: BridgeTargetEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Bridge: remesh target edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Target edge length for local isotropic remesh. <= 0 uses the mean edge length of the dilated cleanup patch.

IntVectorProperty.name: BridgeSmoothIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Bridge: shape smooth iterations (MCF)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Post-remesh CGAL smooth_shape (mean curvature flow) iterations on the cleanup patch (0 = remesh only). This is after remesh and does change the surface shape.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: BridgeSmoothTimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Bridge: shape smooth time step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Time step for smooth_shape. Larger values move more per iteration (more shrinkage risk).

IntVectorProperty.name: ExportBridgeMask
IntVectorProperty.label: Bridge: export cleanup mask array
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Attach cell array SHYXBridgeCleanupMask (1 = cleanup patch) for debugging. Survives bridge remesh (post-remesh mask = remeshed cleanup region).
